skill1.kitLine: Activates after 10 normal attack(s) [datamine template: 5% chance on attack, L10]. Affects self. Emergency-Crafted Bullets: Reload 5.31% of the magazine.
skill1.note: Self reload proc skipped as QoL ammo refill, negligible for damage (note). Source prose says 'after 10 normal attacks' but skill1_detail template says 5%-on-attack chance (L10=5); override note uses the 5%-on-attack reading. Either way the reload itself is unmodeled.

skill1.kitLine: Activates during Emergency-Crafted Bullets. Affects all allies. Temporary Modification: Max Ammunition Capacity ▲ 2, stacks up to 3 time(s), lasts 5 sec.
skill1.note: Flat +2 rounds/stack skipped: maxAmmoPct is percent-of-base not flat rounds, and the extra ammo is negligible for damage (note). The stack counter itself is the backbone of the whole kit but is collapsed into a steady-state fully-stacked assumption rather than modeled explicitly.

skill1.kitLine: Critical Damage ▲ 5.24% for 5 sec (part of Temporary Modification, all allies).
skill1.note: Value 5.24 matches L10. Real kit gates this on Temp Mod stacks and gives a 5s duration; override models it as an unconditional passive, justified by the steady-state fully-stacked assumption (5%-on-attack proc keeps buff maxed across a 180s full-team raid). Ramp-up/uptime not modeled.

skill2.kitLine: Only activates when Temporary Modification is at max stacks. Affects all allies. Critical Rate ▲ 10.08% continuously.
skill2.note: ⚑ VALUE STALE. Override models 3.32 (the skill2_detail datamine-table L10 value), but the char-extract in-game prose says 10.08% and ks-extract flags '3.32->10.08 (3x under)'. Line is represented, but at ~3x too low. Max-stacks gating collapsed into passive via steady-state assumption.

skill2.kitLine: Only activates when Temporary Modification is at max stacks. Affects all shotgun-wielding allies. Attack Speed ▲ 42.24% continuously.
skill2.note: Shotgun-gated. Skipped deliberately: no weapon-based target exists and the generic sim team has no SG (note FLAG). Value 42.24 matches L10. Would be a large contributor on a real SG team.

burst.kitLine: Affects all allies. Miracle of Makeshifts: ATK ▲ 2.32% of skill user's ATK. Mirrors the stack count of Temporary Modification, lasts 15 sec.
burst.note: Value 6.96 = 2.32 x 3 max stacks, baking 'mirrors stack count' into a steady-state constant (L10 base 2.32 correct). ⚑ DURATION STALE: override models 10s (skill_value/description_value table), but char-extract prose says 15s and ks-extract flags '10->15s'. On a 20s CD this is 50% vs 75% uptime.

burst.kitLine: Affects all shotgun-wielding allies. Miracle of Makeshifts: ATK ▲ 24.21% of skill user's ATK. Mirrors the stack count of Temporary Modification, lasts 15 sec.
burst.note: Shotgun-gated. Skipped deliberately (note FLAG): SG allies should get (2.32+24.21)=26.53% x3 = 79.59% of caster ATK; override drops the entire 24.21%*3 = 72.63% SG component. Massive understatement on a real SG team.

documentedConfounds.text: Whole kit modeled at steady-state fully-stacked (Temp Mod max 3 stacks assumed permanent); stack counter, 5s buff duration, and ramp-up are not modeled explicitly.
documentedConfounds.why: Justified for a 180s full-team raid where the 5%-on-attack proc keeps the buff maxed; only early-fight ramp would differ, negligible over 180s.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 self reload 5.31% skipped as QoL ammo refill.
documentedConfounds.why: Reload/ammo economy does not meaningfully change damage in the sim's auto-play scope.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 Temporary Modification flat Max Ammo +2/stack skipped (maxAmmoPct is percent-of-base, not flat rounds).
documentedConfounds.why: Flat +2 rounds is negligible for damage and not expressible via the percent-based ammo stat.

documentedConfounds.text: FLAG: every Shotgun-gated line skipped (S2 Attack Speed 42.24%; burst ATK 24.21%*3 = 72.63% caster ATK) — no weapon-based target and generic sim team has no SG.
documentedConfounds.why: Deliberate and KNOWN, but would massively understate Tove on any real shotgun team (drops her largest single contribution). COLD only within the current non-SG generic-team scope (graded teams = 0).

documentedConfounds.text: ks-extract finding: S2 crit-rate STALE 3.32 -> 10.08 (3x under). Override models 3.32; char-extract in-game prose shows 10.08%.
documentedConfounds.why: NOT acknowledged in the override note (author treats 3.32 as the full-stack value). If 10.08 is the true L10 value, team crit rate is ~3x too low, directly understating team DPS. Root cause is a source-data split between the datamine table (3.32) and the composed prose (10.08).

documentedConfounds.text: ks-extract finding: burst duration STALE 10 -> 15s. Override models durationSec 10; char-extract prose says 15 sec.
documentedConfounds.why: On a 20s burst CD, 10s vs 15s duration is 50% vs 75% uptime of the 6.96% caster-ATK buff — a real DPS gap. Source-data split between description_value table (10) and prose (15).

authorIntentSummary: The author built a steady-state, fully-stacked model of Tove: S1 = passive all-ally Crit Damage 5.24%, S2 = passive all-ally Crit Rate 3.32%, burst = all-ally casterAtkPct 6.96% (2.32% x 3 max 'mirrored' stacks) for 10s on burstCast. The Temporary Modification stack counter and all durations/ramp are collapsed into the assumption that her 5%-on-attack proc keeps the buff permanently maxed across a 180s full-team raid. All Shotgun-gated lines (S2 Attack Speed 42.24%, burst SG ATK 72.63% caster ATK) and the ammo/reload QoL lines are deliberately skipped as unexpressible/irrelevant for the generic non-SG sim team. Known-not-faithful spots per the note are the SG lines; additionally the override uses datamine-table values (crit rate 3.32, burst 10s) that the char-extract prose and ks-extract flag as stale (10.08%, 15s) — a discrepancy the author does not appear to have caught.
